title: Smoked Salmon Dutch Pancakes
description: Indulge in these rich and creamy Dutch pancakes filled with smoked salmon, perfect for a luxurious brunch.

ingredients.name: All-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: Dutch flour is ideal, but regular flour works too

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, eggs, and milk until smooth.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and melt 2 tbs of butter.
Add the diced shallots and cook until translucent.
Pour in the batter and cook until bubbles form on the surface.
Flip the pancake and cook until golden brown.
Meanwhile, mix the smoked salmon with dill and season with salt and pepper.
Add the salmon mixture to one half of the pancake.
Fold the other half over the salmon.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes and serve with the remaining butter.
